title: Weekly vendor sync — landing-zone status & cutover strategy
purpose: Check landing-zone sign-off progress with Northwind and surface the sponsor's preference on cutover strategy.
desired_outcome: A committed written-sign-off date, and a clear owner for the cutover-strategy recommendation.

decisions.text: Cutover-strategy choice (phased vs single-weekend) goes to the 2026-06-10 steering as a written recommendation.
Northwind commits to written landing-zone sign-off by 2026-06-04.

notes: Amir gave a verbal OK on the landing zone but flagged one more internal backup-config review. Sarah noted the sign-off is now past its own deadline and updated card 0001. Mark was not on the call but had restated (via email) that he wants a single-weekend cutover.
